message:
fix(fusion): remove double score calibration of fast-tier semantic hits

Phase 2 reconstructs VectorHit objects from ScoredResult.fast_score
values that were already calibrated in Phase 1 (~line 894). Applying
apply_score_calibration_to_hits a second time double-transforms the
scores, destroying discriminative power for non-idempotent calibrators
(TemperatureScaling, PlattScaling, IsotonicRegression).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
